title: California Public Records Act Request (Los Angeles County Sheriff's Department)

communications.communication:
To Whom It May Concern:

Pursuant to the California Public Records Act, I hereby request the following records:

Dear Custodian of Records,

This is a request under the California Public Records Act.

I request copies of any and all records related to a police response involving me in or around "Koreatown", Los Angeles, in 2018. This request includes, but is not limited to, incident reports, arrest reports (if any), call-for-service records, dispatch logs, and any related documentation.

My identifying information is as follows:
Name: Young Jin Jung
Date of Birth: April 2, 1988

If any portion of the requested records is exempt from disclosure, please provide the non-exempt portions and indicate the legal basis for any redactions or withholdings.

Please inform me of any fees associated with this request prior to processing.

Thank you for your time and consideration.

Sincerely,
Young Jin Jung

The requested documents will be made available to the general public, and this request is not being made for commercial purposes.

In the event that there are fees, I would be grateful if you would inform me of the total charges in advance of fulfilling my request. I would prefer the request filled electronically, by e-mail attachment if available or CD-ROM if not.

Thank you in advance for your anticipated cooperation in this matter. I look forward to receiving your response to this request within 10 calendar days, as the statute requires.

Sincerely,

Young Jin Jung
